zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothy於1414年1月1日出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾時，她的父親Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothy27歲，母親Elizabeth de Cathcart19歲。她於1426年與Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailes在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾普雷斯頓吉可結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1482年2月在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾海利斯 卡素享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothy于1414年1月1日出生在苏格兰雷福福爾时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothy27岁，母亲Elizabeth de Cathcart19岁。她于1426年与Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailes在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾普雷斯頓吉可结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1482年2月在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾海利斯 卡素享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wallace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Wallis  , especially in Scotland, where the name was introduced from the Welsh Marches by a family of tenants of the Stewarts in the 12th century.
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, e.g.   Wallach  .

variants.name: Wallis
meanings: Scottish and English: from Anglo-Norman French Waleis, Walais ‘Welshman’, also sometimes ‘Breton’ (from Old English wēalas, walas, plural of walh, wealh, originally meaning a ‘Roman citizen’ and referring to the native British population, but in Old English this term later came to mean ‘serf, unfree person, foreigner’ or ‘Welshman’). In western and central England the medieval reference is clearly to Welshmen. In Norfolk and Lincolnshire, the reference was probably to Bretons, many of whom settled in the eastern counties after the Conquest. Compare Welsh , Walsh . The idea that the Scottish surname refers to the Welsh-speaking Britons of Strathclyde is erroneous.

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothy was born on 1 January 1414, in Renfrewshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothy, was 27 and her mother, Elizabeth de Cathcart, was 19. She married Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailes in 1426, in Prestonkirk, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 7 daughters. She died in February 1482, in Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothy est née le 1 janvier 1414, à Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothy, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Cathcart, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailes en 1426, à Prestonkirk, Haddingtonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en février 1482, à Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 68 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothyが1414年1月1日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothyは27歳，母Elizabeth de Cathcartは19歳であった。1426年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアプレストンキルクでPatrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1482年2月にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアヘイレス カストルで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothy(이)가 1414년 1월 1일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothy(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Cathcart(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1426년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 플레스토커크에서 Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1482년 2월 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 하일레스 카스틀에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothy nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1414, em Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothy, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Cathcart, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailes em 1426, em Prestonkirk, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 7 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothy родилась 1 января 1414 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothy было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Cathcart, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailes в 1426 г. в местности престонкирк, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла февраль 1482 г. в местности хеилесь кастл, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 68 лет.

es.Hailes Castle, Prestonkirk, East Lothian: Prestonkirk, East Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ellen Wallace of Auchinbothy nació el 1 de enero de 1414, en Renfrewshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Thomas Wallace 1st Auchinbothy, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Cathcart, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Patrick Hepburn 1st Lord Hailes en 1426, en Prestonkirk, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en febrero de 1482, en Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 68 años.
